title: Vanilla+ modern armour loader
description: This texturepack loads the armour texture for Marlow's texturepack for the latest versions!
body:
![Diamond armour with Marlow's texturepack and mine, minemen 1.21.11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f45b39b939c83dc4e7e7baf7ba91fbd0538e643b.png)This texturepack fixes the problem of armour in marlow's texturepack not loading for the lastest minecraft versions, so this texturepack fixes this problem by recodding the armour texture again.

**TUTORIAL!**

You need to alredy have a the Marlow's texturepack which you can download in marlow's manor discord channel: https://discord.com/invite/marlow

When you have downloaded the Marlow's texturepack, launch minecraft 1.21.2+ and then go to the resourcepacks and put Marlow's texturepack higher than the armour loader, on this puicture is the **_WRONG_** display of the texturepacks, **WRONG ORDER** ![texturepacks wrong display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49a1bd460d10d1502d0b52cab87a8837402a0ebd.png)

**This is the CORRECT ORDER!!!**
![Correct order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd2eda93eae93ff9f74664ed10484e90830c272.png)
